comment_text.sn22.70:1.4: Commentary says, “shaped by the conditioned nature of desire”.

root_text.sn22.70:1.2: Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.70:1.3: “sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ desetu, yamahaṁ bhagavato dhammaṁ sutvā …pe… vihareyyan”ti.
root_text.sn22.70:1.4: “Yaṁ kho, bhikkhu, rajanīyasaṇṭhitaṁ; tatra te chando pahātabbo”ti.
root_text.sn22.70:2.1: “Yathā kathaṁ pana tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsī”ti?
root_text.sn22.70:2.2: “Rūpaṁ kho, bhante, rajanīyasaṇṭhitaṁ; tatra me chando pahātabbo.
root_text.sn22.70:2.6: viññāṇaṁ rajanīyasaṇṭhitaṁ; tatra me chando pahātabbo.
root_text.sn22.70:2.7: Imassa khvāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāmī”ti.
root_text.sn22.70:3.2: Sādhu kho tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsi.
root_text.sn22.70:3.3: Rūpaṁ kho, bhikkhu, rajanīyasaṇṭhitaṁ; tatra te chando pahātabbo.
root_text.sn22.70:3.7: viññāṇaṁ rajanīyasaṇṭhitaṁ; tatra te chando pahātabbo.
root_text.sn22.70:3.8: Imassa kho, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena attho daṭṭhabbo”ti …pe…
root_text.sn22.70:3.9: aññataro ca pana so bhikkhu arahataṁ ahosīti.

translation_text.sn22.70:1.2: Then a mendicant went up to the Buddha … and asked him,
translation_text.sn22.70:1.3: “Sir, may the Buddha please teach me Dhamma in brief. When I’ve heard it, I’ll live alone, withdrawn, diligent, keen, and resolute.”
translation_text.sn22.70:1.4: “Mendicant, give up desire for whatever is shaped by arousal.”
translation_text.sn22.70:2.1: “But how do you see the detailed meaning of my brief statement?”
translation_text.sn22.70:2.2: “Sir, form is shaped by arousal; I should give up desire for it.
translation_text.sn22.70:2.6: Consciousness is shaped by arousal; I should give up desire for it.
translation_text.sn22.70:2.7: That’s how I understand the detailed meaning of the Buddha’s brief statement.”
translation_text.sn22.70:3.2: It’s good that you understand the detailed meaning of what I’ve said in brief like this.
translation_text.sn22.70:3.3: Form is shaped by arousal; you should give up desire for it.
translation_text.sn22.70:3.7: Consciousness is shaped by arousal; you should give up desire for it.
translation_text.sn22.70:3.8: This is how to understand the detailed meaning of what I said in brief.” …
translation_text.sn22.70:3.9: And that mendicant became one of the perfected.
